name: @speedora/dataset-quality
description: Milestone 1.5 (Dataset Validation & Calibration) pure logic - moved out of apps/worker/src/scripts/{dataset-lib,dataset-quality}.ts in Milestone 5C-B so apps/api's new AI Operations Dashboard (GET /ops/ai/*) can reuse the exact same, already-tested feature-flattening/correlation/missing-data/distribution/drift/weight-calibration math apps/worker's generate-dataset-report.ts CLI script has used since Milestone 1.5, without apps/api importing from apps/worker (apps only talk over HTTP/queue). No DB/Prisma access here - only the pure functions; the Prisma-dependent loaders stay in each app as their own adapter.
